case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. KATHY A SUHY et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MERRILL, ANN K. SUBSTITUTED FOR STEBBINS, DONALD ROGERS AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SUHY, KATHY A DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-15-2008
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SUHY, KATHY A
DECLARATION MONITA DJUMATI FILED RE: CCP SECTION 1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
NOTICE OF NAME CHANGE OF PLTF'S COUNSEL OF RECORD FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC SERVED JUN-19-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUHY, KATHY A

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUHY, KATHY A $1,951.83 PRINCIPAL, $111.30 INTEREST, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,303.13, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION KURTISS A. JACOBS RE: WAIVER OF ALL ATTORNEYS' FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
